skills.desc:
Reduces the chance of triggering attacks of opportunity (from 50% to 25%).

Grants +0.2% Magic Resistance and +0.2% Nature Resistance for each 1% Dodge Chance.

Applies all adjacent enemies with +3% Fumble Chance, -3% Accuracy, and -3% Crit Chance.

7 Crushing to 3 adjacent tiles, 100% Accuracy, 85% Immobilization; then reposition. Damage scales with boots' Protection. Hit: +10% Fumble, -10% Crit Chance, -10% Weapon Damage on target 3 turns (x2).
skills.dyn:
Applies three adjacent targets with -{1.5*AGL}% Counter Chance until the next turn (the effect doesn't stack), then deals Crushing Damage (4 + 20% of boots' Protection + {0.3*STR}) to them with {80+2*PRC}% Accuracy, {20-0.5*PRC}% Fumble Chance, {STR}% Armor Penetration, {AGL}% Crit Chance, and {65+2*AGL}% Immobilization Chance. Then allows the character to reposition to an adjacent tile.

Hitting a target applies it with +{5+0.5*AGL}% Fumble Chance, -{5+0.5*PRC}% Crit Chance, and -{5+0.5*STR}% Weapon Damage for 3 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

With {105+2*STR}% chance Staggers the target if it remains adjacent after receiving a hit.

skills.desc:
Full blocks and dodges grant +5% Control Resistance and +5% Move Resistance for 5 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

Once per 90 turns, removes Stun, Daze, Stagger, or Immobilization upon receiving them.
10 Crushing, 120% Accuracy, 100% Stagger, 80% Knockback. Scales with boots' Protection. Hit: -30% Max Block Power, -20% Control/Move Res, -15% Crit Avoidance 4 turns (x2).
skills.dyn:
Applies the target with -{1.5*AGL}% Counter Chance until the next turn (the effect doesn't stack), then deals Crushing Damage (6 + 30% of boots' Protection + {0.4*STR}) with {100+2*PRC}% Accuracy, {20-0.5*PRC}% Fumble Chance, {STR}% Armor Penetration, {AGL}% Crit Chance, {80+2*AGL}% Stagger Chance, and {60+2*STR}% Knockback Chance.

The damage dealt depends on the equipped boots' Protection.

Hitting the target applies it with -{3*STR}% Max Block Power, -{AGL+PRC}% Control Resistance, -{AGL+PRC}% Move Resistance, and -{1.5*PRC}% Crit Avoidance for 4 turns.

The effect stacks up to 2 times.

skills.desc:
Performs a charge towards the targeted tile.

Grants the skill -1 Range for each adjacent enemy (down to 2 Range).

If there are adjacent enemies after using the skill, grants +15% Dodge Chance and +15% Counter Chance for 2 turns.
Once per 20 turns replenishes 20% Max Energy when Energy <50%.
skills.dyn: Once per {25-0.5*VIT} turns, replenishes {10+WIL}% Max Energy when Energy drops below 50%.

skills.desc: Strike -50% Weapon Damage, 80% Stagger. Reduces all cooldowns 2 turns. On damage: target abilities on 2-turn cooldown. Spear: +1 range.
skills.dyn:
Delivers a strike with -50% Weapon Damage and +{40+2*AGL+2*PRC}% Stagger Chance.

Reduces all cooldowns by 2 turns.

A successful, damaging hit puts all of the target's abilities on a 2 turn cooldown.

If equipped with a spear, grants the skill +1 Range.

skills.desc: Applying Daze/Stun/Stagger/Confusion/Immobilization/Bleeding via strikes/shots replenishes 4% Max Energy. Mighty Kick prolongs those effects 1-2 turns.
skills.dyn:
Dazing, Stunning, Staggering, Confusing, Immobilizing, and causing Bleeding with strikes and shots replenishes {-6+WIL}% Max Energy.

Using "Mighty Kick" against targets with these effects prolongs their duration by 1-2 turns, depending on each individual effect's duration cap.

skills.desc: 5 stacks 6 turns: +4% Dodge, -2% Damage Taken per stack. Movement adds stacks (up to V); dodges prolong. Adjacent enemies +5% Fumble 4 turns.
skills.dyn:
Activates 5 stacks of "Elusiveness" for 6 turns:
+{0.4*PRC}% Dodge Chance
-{0.2*VIT}% Damage Taken

Each dodge as well as received fumbled strikes and shots prolong the effect's duration by 1 turn (up to 6) but reduce its number of stacks.

Moving to other tiles (Charges and Maneuvers count as well) grants an extra stack of the effect for each traveled tile (up to V).

Applies all adjacent enemies with +{0.5*AGL}% Fumble Chance for 4 turns.

The effect doesn't stack.

skills.desc:
Grants strikes and shots against Dazed, Stunned, Staggered, Confused, Immobilized, or Bleeding targets +4% Accuracy, -4% Fumble Chance, and +4% Crit Chance.

Using "Sudden Lunge" against targets with these effects grants the skill +75% Weapon Damage, -50% Cooldown Duration, and -50% Energy Cost.
Grants +1 Range, -33% Energy Cost, and -33% Cooldown Duration to all Charge skills.

Replenish 10% Max Energy, -20% Pain; 5 turns: -3% Damage Taken, -5% Energy Cost, +10% Energy Restoration, +3% Crit Chance, +10% Pain Res per stack (up to VI; +1 per enemy in Vision, adjacent x2). III: -1 all cooldowns/turn. VI: +4% HP if <40%.
skills.dyn:
Replenishes Max Energy and reduces Pain based on missing Health (about {2*WIL}% Energy at full Health, doubling as Health drops), then activates "Adrenaline Rush" for up to {VIT} turns:
-3% Damage Taken
-5% Abilities Energy Cost
+10% Energy Restoration
+3% Crit Chance
+10% Pain Resistance
III stacks: reduces all cooldowns by 1 turn.
VI stacks: replenishes 4% Max Health if the current Health is below 40%.

Grants an extra stack of the effect (up to VI) for each enemy within Vision upon its activation. Adjacent enemies are counted twice.

The effect's duration as well as the amount of reduced Pain and replenished Energy depend on missing Health.

skills.desc: Grants +10% Weapon Damage, +10% Dodge Chance, and -10% Cooldowns Duration if Energy is above 50%.
